data.body:
## Description
Write a failing regression test (tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh) that will verify v2 reference cleanup in story 985e-0421.

## TDD Requirement
Create test file and RUN it to confirm it FAILS (RED) against current codebase before any implementation.

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh following patterns from tests/scripts/test-docs-config-refs.sh
2. Source tests/lib/assert.sh
3. Include these test functions:
   - test_rollback_procedure_deleted: assert ROLLBACK-PROCEDURE.md does not exist
   - test_no_tk_wrapper_row_in_cli_reference: grep for 'the tk wrapper: `tk' should return no matches in ticket-cli-reference.md
   - test_no_tk_sync_ref_in_cli_reference: sync section does not say 'via the tk wrapper'
   - test_no_tk_legacy_archive_ref_in_cli_reference: archive section does not reference 'tk move-to-archive-directory'
   - test_no_tickets_dir_v2_in_worktree_guide: WORKTREE-GUIDE.md does not say '.tickets/ which is git-tracked and shared'
   - test_no_issue_tracker_create_cmd_section_in_config_ref: CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md has no '### `issue_tracker.create_cmd`' heading
   - test_no_tk_script_in_used_by_fields: CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md has no 'the tk script' in Used by fields
   - test_no_tk_in_sync_contract: ticket-sync-events-contract.md has no 'the tk wrapper'
   - test_no_issue_tracker_in_precommit_wrapper: PRE-COMMIT-TIMEOUT-WRAPPER.md has no 'issue_tracker.create_cmd'
   - test_no_issue_tracker_in_example_conf: dso-config.example.conf has no 'issue_tracker.create_cmd='
   - test_no_tk_wrapper_in_validate_work_skill: validate-work/SKILL.md has no 'the tk wrapper' or 'tk commands'
   - test_no_tk_wrapper_in_tickets_health_prompt: validate-work/prompts/tickets-health.md has no 'the tk wrapper'
   - test_no_v2_tickets_comments_in_merge_to_main: merge-to-main.sh comment lines do not contain '.tickets/*.md' patterns
4. Run: bash tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh — expect FAILED output (RED)

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh

## test-exempt justification
N/A — this task creates the regression test.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh
- [ ] Test runs and produces FAILED results against current codebase (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] .test-index entries added mapping each doc source file to this test
  Verify: grep -q 'test-v2-docs-cleanup.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
